prestazioni: Engine: 6.2L GM LT4 V8 (supercharged, engine code LT4) upgraded with a custom Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ supercharger kit (2.9L pulley, ported supercharger housing, and high-flow fuel injectors) pushing 1,000+ HP at 10 psi boost on E85 fuel, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise calibration and launch control tuning.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers (84mm compressor wheels, billet compressor covers) with custom 4-inch titanium downpipes, Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, and a PTP 4-inch intercooler core with billet end tanks for sustained power under extreme heat soak conditions.

Drivetrain & Suspension: Full carbon-fiber driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop, Quaife ATB differential with 3.91:1 gearing, and a custom Öhlins TTX46 coilover setup with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) paired with Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in springs for track-focused stiffness and ride height adjustability.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon-fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed active rear wing (adjustable angle via hydraulic actuators) for dynamic downforce tuning, paired with a Vorsteiner carbon-fiber hood featuring dual heat extractors and a central NACA duct for optimized airflow to the intercooler.

Exterior Styling: Custom matte-black PPF wrap with a satin clear coat finish, Rezvani-specific carbon-fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals, and a bespoke front grille featuring a laser-etched Blackbird bird motif with RGB backlighting (controlled via a dedicated app for color customization).

Wheels & Brakes: HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x12 front, 21x13 rear) in a custom gunmetal finish with titanium lug nuts, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (325/30 R20 front, 355/25 R21 rear). Braking system features a full AP Racing Radical GT kit with 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors, 6-piston calipers (front), and 4-piston calipers (rear) with custom gold anodized finish.
